Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 69 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science 34 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Lent and Lisp 54 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Attention Residuals 173 upvotes, 22 comments
  5. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 86 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel 18 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Mamba-3 98 upvotes, 13 comments
  8. Ghostling 201 upvotes, 35 comments
  9. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 37 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 665 upvotes, 215 comments
  11. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 753 upvotes, 265 comments
  12. purl: a curl-esque CLI for making HTTP requests that require payment 26 upvotes, 5 comments
  13. Parallel Perl – Autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 122 upvotes, 42 comments
  14. VisiCalc Reconstructed 196 upvotes, 75 comments
  15. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 740 upvotes, 332 comments
  16. Molly Guard 94 upvotes, 35 comments
  17. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 342 upvotes, 176 comments
  18. Show HN: Red Grid Link – peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth, no servers 42 upvotes, 16 comments
  19. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 118 upvotes, 60 comments
  20. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 35 upvotes, 13 comments
  21. We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster 196 upvotes, 112 comments
  22. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 77 upvotes, 41 comments
  23. The Ugliest Airplane: An Appreciation 61 upvotes, 31 comments
  24. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas 251 upvotes, 177 comments
  25. A look at content scrambling in DVDs 40 upvotes, 21 comments
  26. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 559 upvotes, 451 comments
  27. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 90 upvotes, 84 comments
  28. Italy, Belgium set to lose gas supply after biggest LNG plant bombed 32 upvotes, 24 comments
  29. Man pleads guilty to $8M AI-generated music scheme 26 upvotes, 23 comments
  30. Our commitment to Windows quality 513 upvotes, 930 comments

Last generated 5:00pm, 21 March 2026. Source here.
